calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came as reassigment from PJ Department.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp.
No appearance by defendant.
Witnesses:
Ernest Nolles, Vice-President of Operations
Nancy Rodriguez, Lease Administrator
Exhibits:
Exhibit 1. Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2. Certificate of acceptance.
On Plaintiff's motion the name of the defendant is amended to: Renoo Hmatpongtua and will be reflected on the judgment.
After hearing the evidence, the court ordered the following judgment:
Principal of $19,522.44
Attorney's fees of $2,300.00
Costs of $155.00
Interest of $1,240.88.
For a total judgment of $23,218.32
It is further ordered that plaintiff is entitled to immediate possession of equipment described in Exhibit 1 attached hereto.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Assigned To Trial Court
